title: valeriana calvescens
intro: Valeriana calvescens, also known as Kalmia valeriana or Western Valerian, is a perennial plant native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. This plant contains valerenic acid and isothamnetine, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including sedative, anti-anxiety, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Valeriana calvescens include improved sleep quality, reduced stress and anxiety, and relief from muscle and joint pain. Valeriana calvescens can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
